acceptance_targets: [CH6_CRAFT_001] PASS if revised lines anchored around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:157-191 contain no more than three quoted policy lines and at least two concrete embodied consequences tied to specific costs, and the exchange around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:275-307 includes one explicit conflict beat before supportive logistics; FAIL otherwise.

[CH6_CRAFT_002] PASS if the revised closing span anchored to snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:391-415 shows (1) a non-volitional physical reaction after the call and (2) a concrete near-term tradeoff that worsens Eli's options; FAIL if the beat ends on scheduling language alone.

[CH6_BOOKER_001] PASS if by the revised closing beat (anchored to snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:389-415) Eli is under a clearly harder binding constraint than he was at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:217, and the scene ends on that pressure rather than a tidy planning note; FAIL otherwise.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines anchored around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:157-191 contain no more than three quoted policy lines and at least two concrete embodied consequences tied to specific costs, and the exchange around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:275-307 includes one explicit conflict beat before supportive logistics; FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the termination beat leans on bureaucratic copy and rapid logistical stabilization, so the narrative softens the embodied and relational violence of job loss instead of fully rendering it.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:157, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:179, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:191, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:275, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:299, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:307 to compress policy text and replace euphemistic handling with scene-level consequence: bodily stress response, immediate money/coverage tradeoff, and at least one interpersonal hard edge before planning resumes.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised closing span anchored to snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:391-415 shows (1) a non-volitional physical reaction after the call and (2) a concrete near-term tradeoff that worsens Eli's options; FAIL if the beat ends on scheduling language alone.
findings.problem: Timidity in the closing call: the scene retreats to transactional bullet points and an organizational note, then exits before the emotional and physical aftershock fully lands.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:391, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:403, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:413, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:415 to hold the moment after Nora hangs up, adding one involuntary bodily response and one decision with immediate cost (time, sleep, money, or route risk) instead of ending on a clean admin marker.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if by the revised closing beat (anchored to snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:389-415) Eli is under a clearly harder binding constraint than he was at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:217, and the scene ends on that pressure rather than a tidy planning note; FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: The chapter's causal turn (termination) does not convert into a harder end-state; the final movement trends toward reassurance (tool gift, compliance note) rather than an escalated irreversible bind.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the run from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:343 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:415 so the atlas handoff carries a cost condition (deadline, reporting burden, access risk, or refusal trigger) and the final line lands on unresolved consequence rather than administrative readiness.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
